name: Lion
description: All hells broken loose, and I hold the pieces. Lion, the Demon Witch

abilities.name: To Hell and Back
abilities.description: Grants self bonus spell amplification and debuff duration amplification upon respawn.

abilities.name: Earth Spike
abilities.description: Rock spikes burst from the earth along a straight path. Enemy units are hurled into the air, then are stunned and take damage when they fall.

abilities.name: Hex
abilities.description: Lion is compelled to share his transfiguration, twisting the essence of those who oppose him.

abilities.name: Mana Drain
abilities.description: Channels and draws mana for the affected unit for Lion himself, while applying a movement speed slow. Can target allied units with mana to transfer mana to them and grants bonus movement speed at a lower rate.

abilities.name: Finger of Death
abilities.description: The Finger of Death now hits all enemy units within the radius. Increases damage and reduces cooldown.
